medicine.anatomy_library_subtitle: BioRender-style illustrations by system · Gemini on demand

emergency.survival_wake_lock_warning: ⚠ Screen may turn off — keep your finger on the screen to prevent it
emergency.survival_listening_hint: Listening — 3 loud knocks automatically activate the beacon
emergency.survival_step_subtitle: Follow these instructions step by step.
emergency.survival_breathing_signal_active: Your signal is active. Rescue is on the way.
emergency.survival_breathing_subtitle: Breathing slowly reduces oxygen consumption and keeps your mind clear.
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_1: Secure the area before approaching the victim.
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_2: Assess consciousness: "Sir/Ma'am, can you hear me?".
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_3: If unresponsive, check breathing (look, listen, feel).
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_4: If not breathing, start CPR (30 compressions x 2 breaths).
emergency.guide_fire_step_1: Activate the alarm and evacuate immediately.
emergency.guide_fire_step_2: If there is smoke, crawl close to the floor (clean air is below).
emergency.guide_fire_step_3: Touch doors before opening; if hot, find another exit.
emergency.guide_fire_step_4: Do not use elevators under any circumstances.
emergency.guide_fire_step_5: Head to the designated Meeting Point.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_1: Stay calm. Drop, cover, and hold on.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_2: Move away from windows, shelves, and objects that may fall.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_3: If outdoors, move away from buildings, trees, and poles.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_4: Wait for the shaking to stop before evacuating.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_5: Do not light matches or use elevators.

curriculum.error_empty_claim: Write your claim content before signing it.
curriculum.error_invalid_email: Check the reference emails — one is invalid.
curriculum.error_same_email: The two references must have different emails.
curriculum.error_no_biometric: Your device does not support fingerprint; you must confirm the manual declaration to continue.
curriculum.error_inactive_session: Your session is inactive. Please sign in again.
curriculum.error_biometric_fail: We could not confirm the fingerprint. Cancel and try again.
curriculum.success_message: The two people you named will receive an email with a magic link to co-sign. Your claim will be verified once both sign (max 14 days).
curriculum.form_subtitle: Your word signed with fingerprint + 2 references = fraud-proof CV.
curriculum.field_claim_placeholder: E.g.: I have worked 5 years as a safety foreman on site without serious incidents.
curriculum.fallback_attest: Your device does not support biometric signing. Tick this box to manually declare that the claim content is truthful (recorded in the audit log).

epp_character.subtitle_complete: Your personal protective equipment is complete and verified for current conditions.

realtime_status.recommendation_mining: Check ventilation and ground-support systems. Monitor fatigue in heavy-machinery operators.
realtime_status.recommendation_construction: Inspect scaffolding and lifelines. Ensure correct harness use for work at height.
realtime_status.recommendation_manufacturing: Review safety guards on moving machinery. Keep aisles clear of obstacles.
realtime_status.recommendation_agriculture: Ensure constant hydration and breaks in the shade. Check PPE for agrochemical application.
realtime_status.recommendation_energy: Confirm energy lockouts (LOTO) before interventions. Use certified dielectric PPE.
realtime_status.recommendation_default: Keep work areas tidy and clean. Take active breaks every 2 hours.

compliance_modal.title: Management Optimization
compliance_modal.action_risk_matrix_desc: Quarterly reviews are missing in 2 critical operational areas. Updating will reduce exposure to fines.
compliance_modal.action_training_desc: 15 workers have not completed the "Right to Know" induction (ODI) this semester.
compliance_modal.action_findings_desc: There are 3 "High" level findings reported last week that still have no corrective measures implemented.

blueprint_viewer.title: Blueprint and Map Viewer
blueprint_viewer.subtitle: Upload blueprints (exported from AutoCAD as images) to locate risks and resources.
blueprint_viewer.click_to_place: Click on the blueprint to place...
blueprint_viewer.empty_state: Upload an image-format blueprint to begin
blueprint_viewer.empty_state_hint: Supports PNG, JPG, SVG exported from AutoCAD or Revit

morning_checkin.title: Morning Awakening
morning_checkin.subtitle: Shift Synchronization
morning_checkin.psychosocial_prompt: How do you feel about facing today's shift, {{name}}?

structural_calc.title: Structural and Load Calculator
structural_calc.subtitle: Estimate Safe Working Load (SWL) for bolts, slings and scaffolds.
structural_calc.specs_placeholder: E.g. 3/4 inch diameter, Grade 8.8, under pure tension...
structural_calc.safety_warning_body: Results generated by this tool are theoretical estimates based on general standards. They must NEVER replace the calculation and signature of a certified Structural Engineer.
structural_calc.empty_prompt: Enter the element specifications to calculate its safe working load.
structural_calc.wind_subtitle: Quick estimation of wind thrust force on a surface.
structural_calc.local_calc_note: Local calculation based on Bernoulli's principle. For full structural analysis, consult NCh 432.

buckling.title: Euler Buckling (P_cr)
buckling.subtitle: Elastic stability of columns: scaffolds, struts, and temporary structures.
buckling.warning_body: Safety factor is below the recommended minimum of 2.0. Review dimensions, bracing, or reduce the applied load.
buckling.note: P_cr = π²·E·I / (K·L)². Ideal elastic model (Euler 1744). Does not apply for large imperfections or inelastic regime.

hazmat_designer.title: Facility Designer (OGUC / DS 43)
hazmat_designer.subtitle: Code-compliant design for hazardous-material warehouses.
hazmat_designer.empty_prompt: Enter storage parameters to generate the construction and safety requirements.
hazmat_designer.error_design: Facility design error. Please try again.
hazmat_designer.venturi_subtitle: Local (Bernoulli) calculation of air extraction for chemical warehouses. Ref.: DS 594 Art. 35.
hazmat_designer.ach_warning: ACH below the {{minAch}} minimum required by DS 594 Art. 35 for chemical storage. Increase A₂, ΔP or reduce volume.
hazmat_designer.invalid_params: Enter valid parameters (A₁ > A₂, ΔP ≥ 0) to calculate extraction.
hazmat_designer.bernoulli_note: Local calculation via Bernoulli/Venturi equation (ρ air = 1.225 kg/m³). Ref.: DS 594 Art. 35.
